visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Animation-based intro screen. A large Costco Wholesale logo is centered at the top. Below it, a purple box contains a cartoon character avatar and a magnifying glass icon. Large stylized yellow text reads 'Good Market' (好市多). The background shows a blurry warehouse store interior with shelves and shoppers. (2) Product display of MamyPoko Doraemon diapers. Stacks of red boxes with cartoon illustrations. Bright yellow and red text overlays show price calculations. The setting is bright indoor warehouse lighting. (3) Sequence of rapid cuts showcasing various food items: Kinder chocolate, fruit candy jars, beef jerky bags, and seasoned squid snacks. Each shot is a medium close-up of retail packaging on store shelves. (4) Transition to household goods. Bottles of laundry detergent and boxes of insect gel are shown stacked. The camera remains mostly static for each product shot with digital overlays appearing. (5) Final sequence showing alcohol bottles, fresh eggs in yellow bags, and bakery items like madeleines and cinnamon rolls. The lighting is consistently bright and clinical. Text overlays continue to highlight discount amounts.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 每週特價速報. [Slogan]: 04/14~04/20 記得追蹤我們. (2) [Slogan]: 滿意寶寶 哆啦A夢輕巧褲. [Variety]: 原價1049 -210 特價839. (3) [Slogan]: KINDER 健達 巧克力倍多. [Variety]: 原價359 -75 特價284. (4) [Slogan]: 金門高坑 高粱酒牛肉乾. [Variety]: 原價579 -120 特價459. (5) [Slogan]: 蘭諾 衣物芳香豆. [Variety]: 原價799 -160 特價639. (6) [Slogan]: 一點絕 蟑螂凝膠餌劑. [Variety]: 原價1299 -260 特價1039. (7) [Slogan]: 石安牧場 白煮蛋. [Variety]: 原價259 -30 特價229.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Some shoppers are visible in the background of the intro and certain product shots; no clear main character interacts with the camera.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a large Costco warehouse with high industrial ceilings, metal racking, and large quantities of boxed inventory.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Energetic male narration begins immediately over an upbeat, major-key electronic pop track with a steady 4/4 beat. The narrator speaks at a rapid pace with high arousal, announcing the Costco discount news. (2) A sharp 'Pop' sound effect triggers as the first product name is mentioned. The background music remains continuous and bright. (3) A series of 'Ding' sound effects occur in rapid succession, each corresponding to a new product being listed. The vocal delivery is consistent in its high energy and clarity. (4) The interplay between the fast-paced speech and the rhythmic SFX creates a high information density. The music provides a stable, cheerful emotional floor with no pauses. (5) As the video concludes, the narrator's tone remains optimistic and authoritative, ending the vocal track sharply with the last listed item.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a quick, high-energy summary of weekly discounts at Costco Wholesale to encourage followers to shop during the specified date range.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly promotes Costco's weekly sales and lists multiple specific brand products with price discounts.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly standardized social media promotional video using fast cuts and bright text overlays to maintain viewer attention.
